title: Trade Refresh
body:
1.19.4 / 1.20.1 / 1.21.1 / 26.1: **No Dependency**

1.19.2 **Dependency**: L2Library



This mod adds a button in the trading menu that allows player to refresh the trade of an un-traded villager with one click. This is equivalent to breaking and placing the workstation again, but saves player some time.

Refresh can also be bound to a key, allowing faster refresh.

(1.20.1+) If you jave JEI/EMI/REI installed, you can hover over an item in JEI/EMI/REI and press refresh key. It will keep refreshing until the hovered item appears in the trade. Helps you to get the enchantment book you want.

![Trades GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb3c0ddc4ae3ebbd575ec300ce0e717b2dd641b.png)

## Enchantment Table/Trade Control (1.20.1 only)
In 2.4.2, you can also control whether to allow enchantments to be permitted in enchantment tables and trades (note that you can only restrict them if they are allowed originally. If they are not allowed at the beginning, you cannot do anything about it). It supports whitelist/blacklist in mod ID or enchantment ID, making it easier to control.
![enchanted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d1e176f63ded0b3db6c06156bc519d1ad77689d.png)
